hero.title:
Creating Modern
Systems
hero.description: Architecting scalable Java ecosystems and robust Spring Boot applications. Dedicated to high-performance code and clean engineering.

java.title: Java & Backend
java.desc: Architecting enterprise-grade, high-performance backends with Spring Boot. Focused on scalability, modularity and robust system design.

web.title: Fullstack Web
web.desc: Crafting modern, responsive user experiences and seamless REST APIs, prioritized for performance and clean code.

devops.title: Cloud & DevOps
devops.desc: Automating delivery with Docker and CI/CD pipelines, while maintaining high-integrity PostgreSQL databases.

game.title: Game Development
game.desc: Building immersive mechanics and complex gameplay systems in Unreal Engine, blending technical C++ with creative design.

projects.label: DEVELOPMENT & ENGINEERING
projects.title: Selected Works
projects.description: Backend architectures, university tooling, and high-performance systems.

exambyte.title: ExamByte
exambyte.desc: A robust examination system for higher education. Real-time quiz management and automated evaluation systems.

details.description: ExamByte was developed to replace legacy systems for exam admission in programming labs. It bridges the gap between automated testing and manual assessment, providing a seamless workflow for students, correctors, and professors.
details.heroDescription: Scalable Examination Management System. Built with Java and Spring Boot, ExamByte streamlines the entire exam lifecycle—from secure GitHub-based authentication to automated MC-evaluation and manual free-text correction with integrated feedback loops.

stack.label: THE ARCHITECTURE
stack.title: Built for Simplicity
stack.description: Strict adherence to Onion Architecture and Domain-Driven Design ensures a maintainable and high-integrity system.

spring.title: Spring Boot
spring.desc: Utilizing Spring Security for OAuth and Spring Data for robust persistence layers.

auth.title: GitHub OAuth
auth.desc: Secure, developer-centric authentication integrated directly with student accounts.

architecture.title: Clean Design
architecture.desc: Domain-centric design verified with ArchUnit to prevent layer leakage.

deployment.title: Docker
deployment.desc: Containerized deployment using Docker Compose for consistent environment parity.

overview.title: Role Management
overview.p1: ExamByte implements a multi-tier authorization system. Students can take exams, Correctors assess free-text answers, and Organizers oversee the entire process including CSV exports and result publishing.
overview.p2: All role configurations are managed via externalized configuration files, allowing for dynamic updates without system downtime or recompilation.

automatic.title: Auto-Evaluation
automatic.desc: Multiple Choice questions are evaluated in real-time with flexible partial-credit algorithms.

manual.title: Manual Correction
manual.desc: Correctors provide detailed feedback and scoring for complex free-text answers.

admission.title: Admission Tracking
admission.desc: A dynamic dashboard showing current admission status based on historical test performance.

reporting.title: Analytics
reporting.desc: Detailed reporting for organizers to detect issues in question clarity or student understanding.

terrafix.title: Terrafix
terrafix.desc: A factory game where plants fight machines. Developed in 48 hours.

details.heroDescription: Planetary Restoration Reverse-Factorio. Developed during the 48-hour Game Jam 2025. Harness the power of nature to heal and recover dying worlds occupied by machines.

stack.label: THE STACK
stack.title: Technical Foundation
stack.description: The core technologies and methodologies that powered Terrafix.

unreal.title: Unreal Engine
unreal.desc: Development with C++ for high-performance systems and Blueprints for rapid game mechanics iteration.

perforce.title: Perforce
perforce.desc: Team collaboration and versioning of complex assets in a real-time development environment.

figma.title: Figma
figma.desc: UI/UX prototyping and visual conceptualization of the organic user interface.

shaders.title: Custom Shaders
shaders.desc: Custom HLSL shaders for procedural terrain healing and atmospheric reclamation effects.

overview.title: Overview
overview.p1: Terrafix redefines the Factorio principle: instead of gray factories, you use the power of nature. As a small, renegade robot, you build a complex, plant-based network based on a specially developed Custom Node System.
overview.p2: Each plant acts as a living module with individual inputs and outputs that must be strategically linked to transform resources and clean the atmosphere.

growth.title: Node-based Growth
growth.desc: Linking plant structures for automated resource flows and energy networks.

defense.title: Defense & Companions
defense.desc: Defending against enemy waves with the help of a loyal companion.

visual.title: Visual Reclamation
visual.desc: Custom HLSL shaders visualize mechanical corrosion giving way to blooming life.

research.title: Research Table
research.desc: Strategic development of new plants through found mechanical and organic artifacts.

coming_soon.title: Coming Soon
coming_soon.desc: I'm currently crafting high-performance, developer-focused open source tools. Follow my GitHub for updates on upcoming releases.
